triggers.event: Not sure why I'm not very open to share this out in the open, but I have been busy teaching the other business units about AI and our recent wins, but feel pressured cause i need to do better, feel that I did well because I was lucky, and i'm not sure that I can do the same in future. work.whyItMatters1: I don't feel like celebrating my wins. I know what i've done, I know I did well, but there's this voice that says, oh, you're gonna fail and I am afraid it'll amplify my future losses.
work.whyItMatters2: Loss of face, Tired of losing and failing. Feel condemned.
work.whyItMatters3: I feel that I am not performing up to my full potential and will always be pitied. I have to be taken care of.
work.whatIRealize: I am not as strong as I think I am. I am afraid of losing and that might be holding me back. I need to have more confidence in what I do. I need to embrace failures and see it as a journey, not a destination.

triggers.event: Just life in general, especially at night, or when I am reflecting. The meaning of life seems to elude me.

I had wanted to invite President Jokowi for our Jogjakarta event and was hoping to have him come to visit us in SIngapore in August, but that is in flames, because of the current political unrest in Indonesia

me.whyItMatters1: Don't feel it's right. We should stand by a friend. and my faimly's event to not invite Jokowi for our event will burn bridges
me.whyItMatters2: I feel that I have failed. again. I have let down the chapter,
me.whyItMatters3: I will need to think of something better
me.whatIRealize: I am mentally weak at the moment and that tiny failures really can derail any positivity I have.
